EmailTemplate.description: 行程信息变更 就通知创建人 给他看变更后的变更字段
EmailTemplate.name: Exhibition Arrangement Change
EmailTemplate.subject: expo sys notification
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear XXX
您已成功登记在2025年度营销会议期间的入住酒店，已为您预留自2025年1月X日-X日的房间。
您可在抵青后持身份证/护照前往酒店前台办理入住，住宿费需由您在入住时自行支付。离店时请在前台开具发票，随差旅费报销。
酒店名称：青岛海天金融中心酒店
地址：青岛市崂山区仙霞岭路29号
您可点击此链接查看酒店详情
Dear XXX
You have successfully registered for the hotel accommodation during the 2025 Annual Marketing Meeting. A room has been reserved for you from January X to X, 2025. The hotel will send you a reservation confirmation letter later.
Upon arrival in Qingdao, you can check in at the hotel front desk with your passport, and the accommodation fee needs to be paid by you. The hotel accepts Visa, MasterCard and other various payment methods.
When you leave Qingdao, please check out at the front desk and request an invoice for travel expense reimbursement.
Hotel Name: Qingdao Haitian Financial Center Hotel
Address: No. 29, Xianxialing Road, Laoshan District, Qingdao, Shandong
You can click here to view hotel details.
